_comment: Makeshift source registry — the single place where ingestion sources are declared. This file is DATA, not code: add a source by adding an entry, no code changes. It is a hand-authored stand-in for the validated-source store the future source_validation system will write; ingestion reads it via load_sources() (ingestion/sources.py). Tiers (stamped at ingest, never inferred): 0 primary/regulatory, 1 major wire services, 2 quality financial press, 3 signal/high-volume. poll_interval: 5m | 1h | 30s. transform: optional registered function (ingestion/pipeline/transforms.py) applied before field-mapping. expects: quality-gate hints for which output fields must be non-empty.

sources.name: cnbc-finance
sources._note: Wire-grade financial news. AP/Reuters/Bloomberg free RSS is dead or blocked (Reuters host decommissioned June 2020; AP returns 401/403), so CNBC is the accessible Tier 1 stand-in. Standard RSS fields, no transform needed.

sources.name: wsj-rss
sources._note: May require subscription; enable once auth is configured in headers.
